emails.subject: Re: 12-8-00 Mike Swerzbin error
emails.body: Re: 12-8-00 Mike Swerzbin error The broker put delivery point in wrong for a second and then changed it. It is Mid-C. Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 12/08/2000 12:19 PM
